author: phase-4-coordinator
content: After further analysis: build.rs env vars don't propagate to upstream -sys crate builds. The cc crate reads CFLAGS from the process env at build time. Best approach: create .cargo/config.toml with [target.'cfg(windows)'.env] CFLAGS setting. But cargo's [env] table doesn't support per-target filtering. So instead: use a build.rs in ferray-ufunc that writes the header to OUT_DIR and prints cargo:rerun-if-changed, plus document that Windows users need to set CFLAGS. Actually simplest: use cargo's [env] unconditionally — the header has #if _WIN32 guards so it's a no-op on other platforms.
